name: Oric Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
business: Oric Pharmaceuticals is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company dedicated to improving patients lives by overcoming resistance in cancer. Its pipeline includes rinzimetostat for advanced prostate cancer and enozertinib for non-small cell lung cancer with EGFR mutations.
sellsTo: patients with NSCLC with EGFR mutations

exposures.sentence: ORIC Pharmaceuticals is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company dedicated to improving patients lives by O vercoming R esistance I n C ancer.

catalysts.event: Report dose optimization data for rinzimetostat
catalysts.sentence: We expect to report dose optimization data in the first quarter of 2026

catalysts.event: Initiate global Phase 3 registrational trial for rinzimetostat in mCRPC
catalysts.sentence: and we expect to initiate our first global Phase 3 registrational trial for rinzimetostat in mCRPC in the first half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Report data in 1L NSCLC patients with EGFR exon 20 and PACC mutations
catalysts.sentence: We expect to report data in the second half of 2026 in 1L NSCLC patients with EGFR exon 20 mutations as a monotherapy and in combination with SC amivantamab, as well as in 1L NSCLC patients with EGFR PACC mutations as a monotherapy.
